title: astragalus inaequalifolius
intro: Astragalus inaequalifolius, also known as the Chinese milk vetch or Astragalus, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, immunomodulatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus inaequalifolius include reducing fatigue, improving immune function, and enhancing cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Astragalus inaequalifolius is often prepared as a herbal supplement, tea, or extract, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a decoction or infusion.
